title: Fix LCI proxying to conform to spec §17
description: LCI proxying in Zephyr (native, gateway, coap client/server) deviates from Local Client Interface spec section 17. Update to treat local client as IPv6 neighbor using SLIP/IPv6/CoAP, remove or deprecate legacy 0xC1 framing per 11-lci.md. See related project-LICHEN-s3t5.
